E104
programme.desc: Seher, a young girl in Lucknow, is determined to become a doctor. Her mother, Kausar, supports her dream, while her father's plans for marriage spark conflict.

programme.title: E104
programme.desc: Seher, a young girl in Lucknow, is determined to become a doctor. Her mother, Kausar, supports her dream, while her father's plans for marriage spark conflict.

programme.title: E36
programme.desc: Shivaay bravely fights off goons to protect a life-saving injection for Aadhya. Days later, when Aadhya regains consciousness, Baldev is filled with guilt for the harm he caused her.

programme.title: Oto-nardo Da Vinci
programme.desc: Oto is trying to build a working model of a tank, from designs by Leonardo Da Vinci. But the tank won't roll! He followed the plans exactly, so why won't Oto's tank work? Anabella suggests they ask a friend of hers for help, so they visit Florence, Italy.

programme.title: Ghost Hunting
programme.desc: When Mundi is startled by Fico's prank, she insists she isn't afraid of ghosts. They don't even exist! Oto and Anabella definitely believe in ghosts. Mundi vows to prove they don't, with a trip to a so-called ‘ghost town' in Tombstone, Arizona, USA.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Bumble's Party
programme.desc: It's Bumble's hatch day. She wants to arrange a birthday party as they have on Earth, but she doesn't know what cakes or presents are. When the guests arrive, Sprinter and Leo must rush to arrange the party. Is Bumble ever going to learn to pronounce 'birthday party'.

programme.title: Oil Platform
programme.desc: A visit to an oil platform leads to an accident that Kit and Mr. Battery must set right.

programme.title: Ready Steady Go
programme.desc: Joe and Uncle Jack help Flo repaint her dinghy as Morris shows off. There's a race to Granny's between Flo and Joe's dinghies. Joe's boat is ahead when Morris falls overboard. He is rescued. Flo's dinghy wins the race. For once Ebb has outshone Morris!

programme.title: That Just Rained Smell
programme.desc: During a sudden rain shower, Luna notices the fresh smell left behind. With Jupiter and Clyde, she turns into a radish to dig into the mystery of that “just rained” scent.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Oil Platform
programme.desc: A visit to an oil platform leads to an accident that Kit and Mr. Battery must set right.

programme.title: Cathedrals
programme.desc: If you want a cathedral, you'd better not be in a hurry! The construction site is a village in its own right, and lasts for several generations! Foreman Howler shows us round a medieval construction site, providing us with a 101 on cathedral-building techniques.

programme.title: Babycritters Club
programme.desc: When Heni runs a dance for all the local animals, Darwin and Newts mind their babies, but they run off so the kids have to learn about their habitats in order to find them.

programme.title: Thaumatrope
programme.desc: How do you make 2 pictures blend into 1? We'll show you how with this optical illusion that'll put you in a spin!

programme.title: Oto-nardo Da Vinci
programme.desc: Oto is trying to build a working model of a tank, from designs by Leonardo Da Vinci. But the tank won't roll! He followed the plans exactly, so why won't Oto's tank work? Anabella suggests they ask a friend of hers for help, so they visit Florence, Italy.

programme.title: Ghost Hunting
programme.desc: When Mundi is startled by Fico's prank, she insists she isn't afraid of ghosts. They don't even exist! Oto and Anabella definitely believe in ghosts. Mundi vows to prove they don't, with a trip to a so-called ‘ghost town' in Tombstone, Arizona, USA.

programme.title: Rise Up!
programme.desc: Eric learns that yeast is used to make bread rise and that it produces gases when it feeds on sugar. He does an experiment with a balloon to show how this works.

programme.title: Heart of a Lion
programme.desc: Ice hockey player Liam takes on men twice his age in an action-packed match, the Icicles are put through their paces at the dress rehearsal for a big competition, and solo skaters Kloe and Beccy head to the British Championships.

programme.title: First-Hand Vet Experience
programme.desc: Sam is due to operate on Stella, the dog after she got injured in a car crash. But is he ready to take part in urgent surgery? Plus, the Junior Vets join the emergency response team at the races and help heal hurt hooves down on the Vet School farm.

programme.title: The Big Dig
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts go on a big dig adventure to find dinosaur bones.

programme.title: May the Force Be With You
programme.desc: Eric learns about tiny electrons and how they are connected to creating static electricity. Then he rubs his head with a balloon to create his own static electricity, and uses this to move an object without touching it.

programme.title: Sensational Senses!
programme.desc: Eric is blindfolded and has to figure out what a mystery object is using his other four senses – hearing, taste, touch and smell. He learns that although most animals have the same senses people do, they use them differently.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Babycritters Club
programme.desc: When Heni runs a dance for all the local animals, Darwin and Newts mind their babies, but they run off so the kids have to learn about their habitats in order to find them.

programme.title: Mosaic Madness
programme.desc: Doki accidentally breaks Anabella's vintage tea tray and she's mad. Doki wants to make it up to her, but how can he fix her broken tea tray? The team heads to Istanbul, Turkey, where a ‘puzzle solving pro' is putting together fragments of an ancient ruin.

programme.title: Childhood
programme.desc: Children of noble stock receive an education in a castle environment while peasant offspring spend their youth working in the fields or at home. Daily life is busy, from a very young age. But kids never forget to have fun and goof around or playing pranks on each other.

programme.title: The Shore
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery break into the lighthouse to find out what it's for.

programme.title: Ships
programme.desc: The icebreaker loses its crew, and Kit and his curious crew must jump in and bring the ship safely to the port.

programme.title: Big Top Doki
programme.desc: Doki is sure giants don't exist until they're invited to come and be giants, at a giants' festival. But how can we be giants? They set off to Douai, France to find out! On arrival, they literally run into two giants.

programme.title: Big Top Doki
programme.desc: Doki is sure giants don't exist until they're invited to come and be giants, at a giants' festival. But how can we be giants? They set off to Douai, France to find out! On arrival, they literally run into two giants.

programme.title: Fruit Pudding
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula prepare delicious fruit pudding to teach everyone how important it is to eat a lot of fruit.

programme.title: New Zealand
programme.desc: Explored Auckland's War Memorial Museum, Waitomo's glowworms, Queenstown's skyline gondola, 415-ft bungy jump at Kawaru Bridge, and a thrilling shotover jet ride-unforgettable week in New Zealand!

programme.title: The Whole Tooth
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts go on an adventure to match a lost tooth to its owner.

programme.title: Bee Good
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts are on a boogie-dancing mission to help a Baby Bee find her way home.

programme.desc: Sam and Morgan operate on Gandalf the falcon's lumpy foot. And the Junior Vets are about to find out what real vet work is all about. But will Saira overcome her fear of big dogs to help stray hound Jessie, who needs life-changing surgery?

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: Boss Shark: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: Witness a shark competition unlike any other, where great whites go head-to-head in jaw-dropping tests of strength. Risk it all with shark specialist Dr. Riley Elliott as he tries to answer an age-old question: Which sex reigns supreme?

programme.title: Boss Shark: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: Witness a shark competition unlike any other, where great whites go head-to-head in jaw-dropping tests of strength. Risk it all with shark specialist Dr. Riley Elliott as he tries to answer an age-old question: Which sex reigns supreme?

programme.title: E3 - The Sandveld: Land of Contrasts
programme.desc: A narrow and harsh belt of western coastline in southern Africa is a land of contrasts where creatures are forced to adapt to survive. Meet the quirky and charismatic inhabitants that call this fragile interplay between land and ocean home.

programme.title: E4 - Namaqualand: the Desert Bloom
programme.desc: For most of the year it’s a desert, but during early August and September the dusty valleys of Namaqualand transform into a wonderland carpeted with wildflowers. Witness this magnificent transformation from arid desert to beautiful oasis.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: E1 - Dragon Mountain: Surviving the Summit
programme.desc: South Africa's Drakensberg is one of the continent's most impressive landscapes. It is home to sharp climatic and ecological gradients as physical conditions change for both land-based creatures and the Raptors that swirl in the skies above.

programme.title: E2 - The Wild West
programme.desc: Trek through the Canadian rainforest, look up at dizzying redwood trees, and explore giant kelp forests with Lizzie as she experiences the wild west coast of North America. Cross paths with wolves and bears while salmon travel upstream to lay eggs.

programme.title: E3 - Mexico
programme.desc: The Yucatán Peninsula is home to tourists, sea turtles, and sargassum seaweed. How do the three coexist in harmony? Is it sustainable? Uncover the secrets behind this Mexican beach, including an ancient birthing ritual that takes place each year.

programme.title: E2 - Lake Manyara National Park
programme.desc: In north Tanzania, towering mountains line a dramatic valley. Enriched by ancient volcanoes, its slopes provide a variety of habitats for life to thrive and its great centerpiece holds water through even the driest of times.

programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: Savdhaan India -Naya Adhyay
programme.desc: The host provides an in-depth analysis of some of the most shocking real-life crime stories in India and sheds light on how the victims fought back for justice.

programme.title: Ye Hai Mohabbatein
programme.desc: A Tamil dentist and Punjabi businessman fall in love, navigating family expectations, parenting, and emotional complexities across cultures.

programme.title: Na Umra Ki Seema Ho
programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.title: E4 - Kelantan
programme.desc: In Kelantan, there is a minority group of Peranakan Chinese. They are distinctly different from the Baba Nyonya in their origins, language, culture, and lifestyle.

programme.title: E2 - Singapore Serial Swindler
programme.desc: We uncover how Singapore's own 'Tinder Swindler' got away with his bold schemes for 4 years. Hear from victims, police, lawyers and even the conman himself.

programme.title: E3 - Indonesia's Spiritual Conman
programme.desc: The inside story of how a magnetic cult leader forever changed the lives of his victims and their families, and the authorities who brought him to justice.

programme.title: E3 - The Eagle Totem
programme.desc: In the province of Bayin Olgii, in the far west of Mongolia, Kazakh nomads capture and train golden eagles to hunt foxes and wolves.

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

programme.title: E3 - How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: Find out all the fun ways JJ likes to play! First, join JJ, TomTom & YoYo as they spend the day indoors pretending to be doctors & nurses. Then, the fun continues outside! When the kids get restless at a family barbecue, they play a fun game of 'Simon Says.' On another adventure, experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo take JJ under their wing & show him how to do classic outdoor camping activities. From racing grocery carts to a doggy playdate, JJ loves to play!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Ultimate Pretend Play Day!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate pretend play day with JJ! When the cookies go missing, it's up to Detective JJ & his sidekick Bingo to follow the clues & solve the case. Then, when JJ gets nervous on his first carousel ride, Mom helps him unlock his imagination & he becomes a brave knight on a valiant steed! The pretend play continues as Captain JJ & first mate YoYo set sail on the high seas to find a lost sock. From playing chef to being a Turtle Scout, you can be anything!

programme.title: E6 - Fun Adventures & Sleepy Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues.

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what's relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: Inside Zaporizhzhia - A Nuclear Power Plant In The Midst Of War
programme.desc: With the Russian invasion of Ukraine, fears of a nuclear accident have returned. In the very first days of the war, Russian troops occupied the exclusion zone around what's left of Chernobyl. Shortly afterwards, they took control of Zaporizhzhia's nuclear power plant.

programme.title: The Current Affairs Documentary
programme.desc: The weekly half-hour program delivers in-depth reporting on topical political issues and newsworthy events. Revealing the story behind the stories, 'Close up' is informative, gripping and visually powerful.

programme.title: USA - The War Against Women's Rights
programme.desc: This film shows the dramatic state of women's rights in the USA, today. Radical abortion bans and the unequal treatment of women and men by the justice system are leading to massive restrictions on fundamental rights.

programme.title: Love My Scent
programme.desc: Chang-soo, a guy who has never been in a romantic relationship, earns a magical power after accidentally wearing a perfume he receives from a stranger. The supernatural power he earns is what any man would dream of, an ability to attract every woman in the world! Ara, a woman Chang-soo has been in love with, begins to sense the scent of Chang-soo and falls in love with him. While they gradually grow their connection, Ara's ex-boyfriend, James, suddenly appears and reveals Chang-soo's secret! Will the two people overcome this predicament and find true love in each other?

programme.title: Frozen
programme.desc: Winnie never knows her mother. Ever since she was a toddler, her father and scientist grandfather had weaved the tale that she works for Santa Claus. Not until Winnie turns twenty does the incredible truth finally dawns on her, when she accidentally opens a freezing chamber in his grandfather's laboratory and resurrects a mysterious young woman inside. This woman is none other than Winnie's long lost mother, Gigi, who, unbeknownst to her daughter, has been cyronically frozen since a fatal car accident twenty years ago. Still very much a teenager, Gigi is shaken not only by the presence of a daughter physically older than her but also by the devastating news that her idol Leslie Cheung has passed away during her long slumber. To make up for lost time, she sets off with Winnie in search of her boyfriend, Kit, who happens to be Winnie's biological father. The Kit that Gigi used to know was a dashingly handsome young man fully convinced he would become a pop star some day. When G

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Frontline of Cold War
programme.desc: The long-awaited “Cold War” series returns! Director Longman Leung together with Terrance Lau and Louise Wong disclose the untold stories of filming “Cold War 1994”. While Terrance reveals filming car chase scenes had been his brush with death, Louise confesses to being stressed to play the role of a gang boss for the first time that took her three months of preparation for the action scenes. Longman also shares about the tycoon kidnapping case in the film inspired by real cases from the 1990s......

programme.desc: A 50-something writer in a mid-existential crisis impulsively adopts a collie. The bond between him and the dog transforms in meaningful, unexpected ways.

programme.title: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: When an elite team of firefighters come to the rescue of three siblings, they quickly realise that no amount of training could prepare them for their most challenging job yet – babysitting.

programme.title: E23 - In The Clouds
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa helps a boy get his head out of the clouds and focussed on his history test.

programme.title: E1 - Belly Bros
programme.desc: When a kid is bummed that his favorite shirt won't fit over his big belly, it's up to Uncle Grandpa to show him that t-shirts come and go, but having a big belly is always cool.

programme.title: E35 - Tee Ball Trouble
programme.desc: Papa Bear is excited to teach Baby Bear T-Ball, but Baby Bear would rather draw the ball than hit it.

programme.title: E14 - The Tao Of Macau
programme.desc: The day has come when the final four chefs must cook with the world's smelliest fruit durian. This infamous fruit is a delicacy in Macau, but will Padma and guest judge, James Beard Award winner Abe Conlon be able to stomach their creations for the season's last Quickfire? Then, the chefs get a tutorial in the traditional cuisine of Macau, a fusion of Chinese and Portuguese flavors, and are joined by their family members from back home. For the elimination challenge, the chefs are tasked with blending their own heritage with Chinese flavors in order to impress their love ones and the judges, in order to earn their spot in the finale.

programme.desc: Ben, Kevin and La Grange find themselves stuck 'outside of time' after the latter hijacks a supersonic train with a faulty engine, forcing the trio to team up and slow down.

programme.title: E412 - Alarm Bean/Operation Wicket/Supermarket Ride/Bean’S Blooms/Drone Rescue
programme.desc: Mr Bean builds an alarm clock to wake him up in time for a comet fly-by.

programme.title: E118 - The Catfish/The Cycle/The Stars/The Box/The Grades
programme.desc: When Gumball and Darwin realise Grandpa Louie has no friends on Elmore Plus, they feel bad. So they create one - called Muriel. However when Granny Jojo finds out Louie has been spending time online with another 'woman', Muriel not existing isn't going to stop her being destroyed.

programme.title: E6 - Free Cake/Appreciation Day/Cruisin/Carter And Briggs/Expert Or Liar
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby try to seize an opportunity to eat a piece of cake, and it comes when they learn that Skips' birthday is coming soon.

programme.title: E7 - Death Punchies/A Bunch Of Baby Ducks/Camping Can Be Cool/Blind Trust/Real Date
programme.desc: Tired of Mordecai always beating him at punchies and getting his way, Rigby decides to learn the martial art of 'Death Kwon Do'.

programme.title: E11 - 明道帶王鷗見父母
programme.desc: 三對明星情侶：內地演員鄭愷與圈外女友程曉玥，台灣歌手潘瑋柏搭檔內地女主持吳昕，台灣演員明道搭檔內地女演員王鷗；還有素人情侶加入，一起修煉愛情，傳遞正能量。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E12 - 收官之夜 終極盛典
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E4 - 掃「雷」聯盟成立
programme.desc: 由劉宇寧、龔俊、孫紅雷、李乃文、陳赫、陳星旭、王玉雯、歐陽娣娣組成爆笑「地球團」，沿著地球脈絡從中國出發，感受北緯40度的煙火氣，通過遊戲任務解鎖各地文化與美食，用新鮮有趣的方式，探索全世界的同頻快樂。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。
